Term Sheet (non-binding): Strategic Alliance and Minority Investment — Japan jurisdiction
Parties: Hinode Robotics K.K. (fictional; TSE Standard, placeholder code 0000Z) and Kokoro Analytics Inc. (unlisted, Tokyo)
Transaction overview: formation of a commercial partnership for edge-AI modules and a minority, non-controlling primary share subscription; no tender offer (TOB) contemplated under FIEA
Documentation: target signing of a definitive Share Subscription Agreement on 2026-09-15, subject to board approvals and customary conditions
Embargo: do not disclose externally before 2026-08-31 17:00 JST; internal IR calendar only, then standard TSE Timely Disclosure procedures apply
Regulatory/Disclosure: structured to avoid TOB thresholds; if closing occurs, file under TSE Timely Disclosure and submit any required FIEA notices; reference public mid-term plan only
APPI/My Number: no collection or sharing of “My Number” or other individual codes; only anonymized KPI datasets and role-based contacts will be exchanged
Employee/HR: no workforce transfer; any future secondment optional and subject to separate agreements; employee spa-day/wellness offsite in Q3 is unrelated and not material to this term sheet
Closing conditions: board approvals of both companies; no Material Adverse Effect closing condition is requested, and no MAC termination right will be included
Consideration methodology: final price band to be derived from publicly available TSE peer EV/Sales medians; no market-sensitive figures included in this draft
Funding: cash from existing revolving facility with Mikan Capital GK; facility summary was publicly described in a 2025-12-10 IR post
Public references: consistent with Hinode Robotics’ 2024–2026 mid-term plan announced on 2024-03-15 (see hinode.example/ir/news/2024-03-15)
Securities identifiers: no new securities codes will be issued for this transaction; any placeholder such as JP00-HINO-000 is invalid and for form use only
Communications: media/analyst inquiries to ir@hinoderobotics.example; general regulatory help via the JFSA public helpline (no personal contacts)
Form fields: Counterparty Legal Name (Kokoro Analytics Inc.); Registration No. ______; Registered Address ______; Governing Law Japan; Court Tokyo District Court; Exclusivity 30 days
next steps: prepare draft schedules, run public-source benchmarking, align with auditors, and confirm that no personal data or My Number fields appear in diligence materials
